# Memories Properties

> Memories is a private real estate practice sourcing off-market investment projects, development land, and prestige property for a discreet roster of investors and family offices. By introduction only.

Memories has operated since 2014, headquartered in Cyprus with a focused presence across select Mediterranean and European markets. The practice specialises in investment-grade mandates: development land, agricultural estates, coastal plots, mixed-use assets, and off-market residential portfolios.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the private practice and featured investment projects.
- [Properties](/properties): Curated portfolio of investment projects, land, and off-market real estate.
- [About](/about): The story, values, and approach of the practice since 2014.
- [Insights](/insights): Quarterly market briefings on selectivity, asset mix, and ticket sizes.
- [Common Questions](/common-questions): Answers about off-market real estate, private viewings, and how to work with the practice.
- [Off-Market Investing Guide](/guides/off-market-investing): How to find and acquire off-market investment properties.
- [Contact](/contact): Begin a conversation with the practice.

## Regions

- [Paphos](/properties/region/paphos): Investment properties, development land, and coastal homes in Paphos, Cyprus.
- [Limassol](/properties/region/limassol): Investment properties, development land, and prestige real estate in Limassol, Cyprus.
